target_state.bot: Portable Python — any VPS or Cloudflare Worker (via Deno/WASM in future)

cloudflare_pages_frontend.connect_via: Cloudflare Pages dashboard → Connect GitHub → Sentinelfortune/sentinelfortune

r2_bucket.canon_seed: Upload originus/_canon/* files via R2 console after repo push

telegram_bot.move_to: Any VPS with Python 3.11+, or keep on Replit long-term

migration_order: 1. Set all STRIPE_BUY_LINK_* env vars in Replit + CF Workers
2. Bind originus R2 bucket to sentinel-fortune-ecosystem worker (ORIGINUS_R2)
3. Upload originus/_canon/*.json files to R2 via dashboard
4. Connect GitHub to CF Pages → trigger first build
5. Test CF Pages frontend loads correctly on custom domain
6. Point sentinelfortune.com DNS to CF Pages (if not already)
7. Verify all /api/* routes still work via CF Worker proxy
9. Replit becomes optional — can deactivate or keep for bot only
